CONTENT.Honours: Al HilalSaudi Professional League: 2017–18, 2019–20, 2020–21, 2021–22, 2023–24King Cup: 2019–20, 2022–23, 2023–24Saudi Super Cup: 2018, 2021, 2023, 2024AFC Champions League: 2019, 2021RecordsFastest goal in the AFC Champions League Final: 2021 (16 seconds in against Pohang Steelers)
CONTENT.Club career: On 23 November 2021, Al-Dawsari scored the fastest goal ever in the AFC Champions League, just 16 seconds into the game, propelling his side to a 2–0 victory over Pohang Steelers to secure a record fourth continental title for Al Hilal.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 31 May 2024Statistics accurate as of match played 10 September 2024

SUMMARY: Nasser Essa Shafi Al-Shardan Al-Dawsari (Arabic: ناصر عيسى الدوسري; born 19 December 1998) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a left-back, defensive-midfielder or central-midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal.
